title: Master of Balance
description:
About usFor more content updates and feedback, welcome to join the Discord group!

Об игреMaster of Balance is a workplace survival game.

You play as a junior manager who must maintain a delicate balance across five key stats: boss, subordinates, family, health, and wealth.

Every choice you make has the potential to turn the situation on its head in an instant. But you can use your superpowers to turn the tide. 

Unleash your imagination in this absurd world!

Can you survive long enough to uncover the truth?

Office Simulator: Every decision affects your boss, subordinates, family, health, and wealth. 

Weird Superpowers: Unlock superpowers to help you survive. Each power helps you pursue your own agenda.  Combine them to create your own survival strategy!

Multiple-ending narrative: A light-hearted and humorous main storyline, with over five different endings – which will you choose?
description_short: Master of Balance is a workplace survival game. You play as a junior manager who becomes caught up in a bizarre, otherworldly incident. To survive, you must carefully handle both daily life and work responsibilities while uncovering the truth behind what happened.
